reviews.review_description: If so I'll play it again
I haven't even started playing it but i already know its gonna be soooooo fun
Are you a construction worker because you are building😀👍

developer_response.body: Haha, love that! We’re definitely building something big with the next update—stay tuned for more improvements! Thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description:
Scaryness is 10 out of 10 
But most the other stuff besides shop from what I’ve played is kind meh like the textures in the levels weren’t great would recommend just not 5 stars except for how scary it is

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks a lot for the feedback! We're super glad the horror landed for you that 10/10 means a lot.

We’re currently reworking what was originally Level 1 (now called Chapter 1) with major improvements to textures, lighting, and pacing. The layout’s getting a full polish pass to feel more immersive and alive, and we're using feedback like yours to guide it.

Appreciate you giving it a shot, more updates and scarier content are coming soon!

-Beyond Illusion Studios Team

Hey, thanks for playing Labyrinth and for your feedback!

We totally hear you, bugs are never fun, and we're actively working on fixes. Our team is currently deep in development on upcoming patches to smooth out those rough edges and improve performance. Alongside that, we're also expanding the game with new content, mechanics, and polish based on community feedback.

If there are any specific bugs or moments that frustrated you, feel free to share them with us directly, it really helps us prioritize. Thanks again for sticking with us, and stay tuned. Big updates are on the way!

-The Beyond Illusion Studios Team

reviews.review_description: Really good but you should add a level selector but honestly it’s. GOOD

developer_response.body: Glad you’re enjoying it! 😊 A level selector is a great idea, we’ll definitely consider it for future updates. Stay tuned for more improvements and thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description:
This Game is not scary because the jumpscare doesn't work, and the sound gets annoying really fast, the buttons don't work. It's just really bad 😭 
I really wish there were private servers too. And make the monster more scarier and make a jumpscare cuz it doesn't work

Try harder pls

developer_response.body: Hey! We appreciate your feedback! This game hasn't been updated in almost a year, but we're working on a fresh new update with a better start, improved jumpscares, and overall fixes. We’re also considering features like private servers with a Co-Op mode. Thanks for sharing your thoughts stay tuned for what's coming next!

reviews.review_description: When I tried this game it was the best fan horror I ever screamed at so hard

I’m disappointed that the person that made one of the best gtag fan games ever bad tag made one of the worst fan games it’s not scary at all the monsters are stuck the levels get easier as they go on and the player models are soooooooo bad at least it’s better than chimp night and chimp mayhem and 1 other i forgot the name of but STILL

developer_response.body: We hear you! We know it’s been a while since our last update, but we’re working on a complete refresh of the game. Expect better monster AI, improved difficulty scaling, and completely redone player models. We’re excited to show what’s coming next—thanks for your feedback!
